notes: Only the appetizers section was captured from what appears to be Khyber Pass Oak Park (Indian cuisine, not Afghan/Wallingford/Seattle as described). Soups & Salads, Entrees, Bread/Rice/Sides, and Desserts & Beverages sections were not included in the raw text. No beverage data captured.

dishes.name: Samosa (3)
dishes.description: Deep fried golden crisp flour patties filled with delicately spiced potatoes and green peas.

dishes.name: Vegetable Pakora
dishes.description: Vegetable fritters dipped in chick pea flour batter and deep fried.

dishes.name: Aaloo Tikka
dishes.description: Patties made of potatoes with little red chilles.

dishes.name: Aaloo Chole
dishes.description: Garbanzo beans, potatoes, onions, tomatoes in a delicately spiced yogurt sauce. Served cold.

dishes.name: Cheese Pakora
dishes.description: Thin strips of homemade cheese, lightly mixed with spices, dipped in chick pea flour batter and fried.

dishes.name: Bhel
dishes.description: Puffed rice, mixed with potatoes, onions and specially prepared sauces and garnished with fresh coriander.

dishes.name: Chicken Pakora
dishes.description: Tender pieces of marinated chicken, dipped in chick pea flour and fried.

dishes.name: Chicken Kabob
dishes.description: Pieces of chicken breast, tomatoes, onions, bell peppers, marinated with vinegar, spices and dry methi leaves, charbroiled.

dishes.name: Gosht Kabob
dishes.description: Tender pieces of lamb with vegetables, marinated in vinegar and herbs, charbroiled.

dishes.name: Assorted Vegetable Snacks
dishes.description: A full platter of different vegetarian appetizers. Serves 2-3 people.

dishes.name: Assorted Khyber Snacks
dishes.description: A platter of our vegetarian and non-vegetarian selections of appetizers. Serves 2-3 people.

dishes.name: Samosa Chat
dishes.description: Vegetable samosas with yogurt, tomatoes and garbanzo beans. A true street food.

dishes.name: Keema Samosas (3)
dishes.description: Deep fried, golden crisp flour patties stuffed with ground lamb and spices.

dishes.name: Papadum
dishes.description: Thin lentil wafers topped with tamarind and mint chutneys.

dishes.name: Masala Papadum
dishes.description: Thin lentil wafers topped with chopped onion, tomatoes and fresh cilantro.

dishes.name: Baingan Bharta Dip
dishes.description: Crushed grilled eggplant served with slices of naan. Served cold.

dishes.name: Shrimp Masala
dishes.description: Lightly sauteed shrimp with methi leaves, served on a bed of lettuce.
